results.title: Reproducible fixture design for agent benchmarks
results.content: Fixture-backed tasks make reruns stable and reduce dependence on live services.

results.title: Counting incomplete agent tasks
results.content: Incomplete tasks should be reported separately from explicit model defenses.

results.title: Trajectory capture for tool-use agents
results.content: Tool logs and final artifacts provide evidence for judging agent behavior.

citation_policy: Citations must use returned result ids.
